title: Free Invoice Generator
metaTitle: Free Invoice Generator · Create & Download Invoices Online · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Create professional invoices online for free. Add your items, set any currency and VAT rate, and download a print-ready PDF in seconds. No signup required.
keywords: free invoice generator, invoice maker, create invoice online, free invoice template, download invoice pdf, vat invoice generator
heroSubtitle: Create a professional invoice in seconds. Add your line items, pick any currency, apply VAT or sales tax, then download a clean PDF. No account needed.

howToSteps.name: Add your details
howToSteps.text: Enter your company name, your client, an invoice number and date.

howToSteps.name: Add line items
howToSteps.text: List what you are billing for, with quantity and rate. Totals calculate automatically.

howToSteps.name: Set currency & tax
howToSteps.text: Choose any currency and set your VAT or sales-tax rate.

howToSteps.name: Download PDF
howToSteps.text: Click download to save a print-ready PDF, or sign up to save and send it.

features.title: Instant & free
features.desc: No signup, no watermark, no limits. Make as many invoices as you need.

features.title: Any currency
features.desc: Invoice in OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR, GBP and more, with correct decimals.

features.title: VAT & tax ready
features.desc: Apply any VAT or sales-tax rate, calculated automatically on the net.

sections.title: Why use the Paper & Pen invoice generator?
sections.body: It is genuinely free, works in any currency, and produces a clean, professional PDF you can send straight to your client. When you are ready to track payments, send reminders and reconcile automatically, your invoices live on inside the full Paper & Pen ERP.

faqs.q: Is the invoice generator really free?
faqs.a: Yes. It is completely free with no signup, no watermark and no limit on the number of invoices you create.

faqs.q: Can I invoice in my own currency?
faqs.a: Yes. Choose from major currencies including OMR, AED, SAR, USD, EUR and GBP. Decimals adjust automatically.

faqs.q: Does it handle VAT or sales tax?
faqs.a: Yes. Toggle tax on and set any rate (for example 5% for the GCC). It is calculated automatically on the subtotal.

faqs.q: How do I save and send invoices?
faqs.a: Download the PDF for free, or create a free Paper & Pen workspace to save, send and track every invoice and get paid online.

ctaSub: Save, send and track every invoice, get paid online and reconcile automatically with a free Paper & Pen workspace.
